name: matrix_and_matrix_paged
title: Matrix + Paged Matrix (one Excel sheet per category)
description: A composite report with two matrices. The first (summary) matrix is bound to SummaryData. The second matrix is bound to CategoryData and BREAKS INTO ONE EXCEL WORKSHEET PER CATEGORY: its outer 'Category' group has a page break (Between) + dynamic PageName, and the tablix starts on a new page. Category is a pagination-only group (no visible row header); RowCat1 is the visible inner row group. Use create_composite_report_from_template with regions {matrix, paged_matrix}.

row_groups.desc: Pagination-only group: one Excel sheet per distinct value (PageBreak + PageName).
Visible inner row group shown within each category's sheet.

bindings_note: paged_matrix.bindings.row_groups = [category_field (drives sheets), inner_row_field]. The category field is auto-applied to the group PageName so each sheet is named by it.
